title: SN medium
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"47tmh","text":"Please refer to our general recommendations to grow cultures :","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b99cb","text":"\nhttps://www.protocols.io/private/A48906DC1374AD6281495CB86A8F092F","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Autoclave and filter aged seawater Work under laminar flow hood. Add to 800mL of seawater the following nutriments that have been autoclaved beforehand (except vitamin) %s %s Filter the medium on 0.2µm (do not autoclave)

Cyano Trace Metal Solution Dissolve all these components separately in milliQ water %s %s Combine the various solutions after full dissolution Make final volume up to 1L with milliQ water Store in refrigerator
creator: Daniel Vaulot
